dashboard_workspace_ready: Your workspace is ready. Start by selecting a module from the sidebar.
employee_roster_description: Track active coverage, leave status, and team ownership in real time.
enter_credentials: Enter your credentials to access Nexus
registrations_description: Track incoming care coordination forms, risk signals, and submission status.
registration_intake_description: All incoming forms with care options, risk count, and status.
intake_selection_note: An email has been sent to the referrer/guardian to select one of these dates.
intake_management_description: Manage client intakes, track goal assessments, and assign care locations.
evaluations_description: Track client progress, manage periodic reviews, and finalize care goals.

invoices_description: Manage billing, payments, and invoice status.
two_factor_description: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
active_sessions_description: Manage the devices and browsers currently logged into your account.
email_notifications_description: Receive account and activity updates by email.
push_notifications_description: Receive instant alerts in your browser.
delete_account_warning: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please be certain.
confirm_password_description: Please enter your password to continue with the 2FA setup.
setup_2fa_description: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app (like Google Authenticator or Authy).

two_factor_enable_failed: Unable to enable 2FA. Verify the code and try again.
recovery_codes_description: Use these one-time codes if you lose access to your authenticator app.
recovery_codes_warning: These codes are shown only once. Store them somewhere secure.
recovery_codes_saved_ack: I have saved these recovery codes in a safe place.
